action: Woke in the owner's suite, swept to the captain's chair to survey the frozen sea, then headed to the galley sensing that command was needed.
thought: I built empires from nothing, baby.

action: Stumbled to the galley half-asleep, boiled water for tea with numb fingers, and tried very hard not to look terrified of the endless ice outside.
thought: This is not how any of this goes.

action: Paced the sun deck in pre-dawn darkness, gesturing wildly at the frozen landscape, already seeing it as a blank canvas awaiting his genius.
thought: This frozen sea is my muse.

action: Sat in the lounge with a notebook, sketching fuel schedules, food rationing, water management, and all the unglamorous math that might keep them alive.
thought: Someone has to actually plan this.

action: Moved through the galley with quiet purpose, heating water, stirring oatmeal, grounding the morning in the simple act of feeding people who were falling apart.

description: In the galley at dawn, all five converged—Diddy commanding, Kanye ranting, Taylor laying down logistics, Selena keeping everyone fed, Justin barely conscious. The first power struggle of survival began over cold oatmeal and terrible coffee.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: Listen up, everybody. The stove is burning—I just engineered a successful rescue operation. This is a movement, baby.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: Movement? I'm the visionary here. I've been redesigning this entire yacht since dawn. It's not a boat, it's a canvas.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: The stove needs fuel every six hours. We have wood for about a week at this rate. Rationing starts now.

dialogue.speaker: justin
dialogue.line: Is anyone else freezing? I just need to know—are we actually getting off this ice floe, or is this it?

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: Getting off? Justin, we are BRANDING this. P. Diddy's Frozen Yacht Experience. Limited edition merch incoming.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: No, no, no. It's not a product, it's ART. I'm redesigning the crew quarters into a meditation space.

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: Or we could focus on not freezing to death before lunch? I made coffee. It's terrible, but it's hot.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: Fuel chart is ready. Food inventory complete. Water schedule locked in. We need fishing gear ready by tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: Fishing gear doesn't have a vision, Taylor.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: No, but it has fish.

dialogue.speaker: justin
dialogue.line: I'll fish. Beats listening to this.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: You're not fishing alone, B. This is Team Diddy now. We move together, we win together.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: Team Kanye. I'm the captain. Actually, I'm the visionary captain.

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: Nobody's the captain yet. Let's just not kill each other before we eat, okay?

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: Here's the deal—Diddy, you keep morale up. Kanye, we need your brain for rigging problems. Justin handles fishing. Selena manages food. I run supplies.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: Hold on. I'm running this show, Taylor. That's the whole point of me being here.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: I'M running this show. I have the vision.

dialogue.speaker: justin
dialogue.line: Can I just go back to bed?

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: No. Eat first. You're all cranky because you're starving.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: The supplies won't stretch themselves. Someone has to make the hard calls. That someone is me.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: You always do this—reduce everything to logistics and spreadsheets. Where's the soul in that?

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: The soul is in not dying. We can have art after we survive.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: I like the vision here, but let me be crystal clear—I'm the captain. At least figuratively.

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: You're the captain. But Taylor's right—supplies are the spine. Eat, stay warm, or everything falls apart.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: Fine. I'll redesign the rigging and be visionary about it. But I'm also the captain.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: You can both be co-captains. As long as I'm running the food and fuel.

dialogue.speaker: justin
dialogue.line: What do I get? Official yacht fisherman?

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: You get first pick of breakfast. And a warm place to sit when you're done freezing.

dialogue.speaker: justin
dialogue.line: ...Okay, I can work with that.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: This yacht is officially under new management—the Diddy-Kanye Joint Command with Taylor Logistics Division.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: I'm not a division. I'm the visionary director of structural redesign.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: You're the visionary director of structural things. That actually matters. I mean it.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: [pauses] Okay. The sun deck is my studio then. Nobody else goes there.

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: It's all yours. Nobody wants it anyway—it's freezing and you're insane.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: So we're locked in on roles? Because I need everyone clear on who's doing what.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: Crystal clear. Now eat before the food gets colder.

dialogue.speaker: justin
dialogue.line: What if I fish all day and catch nothing?

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: Then we eat oatmeal and be grateful. That's survival, baby.

dialogue.speaker: kanye
dialogue.line: Oatmeal is the blank canvas of breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: diddy
dialogue.line: And THAT, Kanye, is why you're my favorite person here right now.

dialogue.speaker: taylor
dialogue.line: [rolls eyes] Can everyone just eat their oatmeal?

dialogue.speaker: selena
dialogue.line: Yes. Eat. Hot food is literally one of the five reasons we're all still sane.
